data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Big Dance Eligible Showcase Wellington Cup is worth 100k over 1700m. 7. ASSOCIATE is a very consistent gelding who probably was a touch unlucky not to have won his last start at Hawkesbury after he was held up when trying to run through them from last, and he had to settle for a game third. This track, with its long run in, will suit him, and with 3kg less to carry, he will only need some gaps to have the last say. 9. AIMPOINT has not won for some time, but he is usually thereabouts in similar fields. He has won his only start here in the past, and he handles most track conditions. He will don the blinkers for the first time in his 40-start career, and they could make all the difference where it matters most. 1. PERFUMIST led up and was not beaten far in the G2 Emancipation Stakes at Rosehill 15 days ago. She will be peaking third up, and Bjorn Baker would have targeted this race. Can win. 3. INDIFFERENCE will be peaking third up, so don't risk him, especially on a wet track.","runners":[7,9,1,3],"exclusive":true}
